This folder redistributes third-party shared libraries that are bundled
with this project for convenience. Each file is the unmodified upstream
binary. The libraries are NOT part of this project's own code and remain
under their respective licenses.

------------------------------------------------------------------------
libchromaprint.dll
------------------------------------------------------------------------
Project:  Chromaprint (audio fingerprinting library by Lukáš Lalinský)
Source:   https://github.com/acoustid/chromaprint
License:  GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1 or later (LGPL-2.1+)
Notice:   The full text of the LGPL v2.1 is included alongside this
          NOTICE as LGPL-2.1.txt. Per LGPL section 6, you have the
          right to obtain the corresponding source code; it can be
          downloaded from the upstream project URL above.

------------------------------------------------------------------------
libgcc_s_seh-1.dll
libgomp-1.dll
libquadmath-0.dll
libatomic-1.dll
libstdc++-6.dll
------------------------------------------------------------------------
Project:  GCC runtime libraries (libgcc, libgomp, libquadmath,
          libatomic, libstdc++) shipped with MinGW-w64
Source:   https://gcc.gnu.org/    https://www.mingw-w64.org/
License:  GPL v3 with the GCC Runtime Library Exception
          (https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gcc-exception-3.1.html)
Notice:   The Runtime Library Exception permits redistribution of these
          binaries together with software covered by other licenses,
          without that software being subject to the GPL.

------------------------------------------------------------------------
libwinpthread-1.dll
------------------------------------------------------------------------
Project:  mingw-w64 winpthreads
Source:   https://www.mingw-w64.org/
License:  MIT-style permissive license (see upstream COPYING.MinGW-w64-runtime)
